message: 🌱 Add urunc: Create a document for Knative and urunc mission (#694)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "urunc-119-create-a-document-for-knative-and-urunc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "urunc: Create a document for Knative and urunc",
+    "description": "Create a document for Knative and urunc. Requested by 0+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current urunc deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your urunc version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n urunc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=urunc\nhelm list -n urunc 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working urunc installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review urunc configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant urunc configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n urunc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=urunc\nkubectl get configmap -n urunc -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=urunc\n```\nWe should also add a section in our documentation regarding the integration of urunc with Knative. The document should be similar to the existing k8s document."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Create a document for Knative and urunc",
+        "description": "Hello  \n\nindeed building unikernels is not very straightforward.That is the reason we created [bunny](https://github.com/nubificus/bunny). However, currently `bunny` is not able to build unikernels from scratch, but we are working on it. However, our documentation could definitely get improved and\n```yaml\ngit clone https://github.com/unikraft/catalog\ncd catalog/examples/http-python3.12-flask3.0\nkraft build .\n\n[●] Build completed successfully!\n │\n └─ initramfs: .unikraft/build/initramfs-x86_64.cpio (52 MB)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade urunc to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade urunc:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade urunc urunc/urunc --namespace urunc\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n urunc\nhelm list -n urunc\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n urunc -l app.kubernetes.io/name=urunc\nkubectl get events -n urunc --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Create a document for Knative and urunc\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hello  \n\nindeed building unikernels is not very straightforward.That is the reason we created [bunny](https://github.com/nubificus/bunny). However, currently `bunny` is not able to build unikernels from scratch, but we are working on it.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "git clone https://github.com/unikraft/catalog\ncd catalog/examples/http-python3.12-flask3.0\nkraft build .\n\n[●] Build completed successfully!\n │\n └─ initramfs: .unikraft/build/initramfs-x86_64.cpio (52 MB)",
+        "#syntax=harbor.nbfc.io/nubificus/pun:0.1.0\nFROM scratch\n\nCOPY build/app-nginx_qemu-x86_64 /unikernel/kernel\nCOPY data.cpio /unikernel/initrd\n\nLABEL com.urunc.unikernel.binary=/unikernel/kernel\nLABEL \"com.urunc.unikernel.initrd\"=/unikernel/initrd\nLABEL \"com.urunc.unikernel.cmdline\"='nginx -c /nginx/conf/nginx.conf'\nLABEL \"com.urunc.unikernel.unikernelType\"=\"unikraft\"\nLABEL \"com.urunc.unikernel.hypervisor\"=\"qemu\"",
+        "#syntax=harbor.nbfc.io/nubificus/bunny:latest\nversion: v0.1\n\n#syntax=harbor.nbfc.io/nubificus/bunny:latest\nversion: v0.1\n\nplatforms:\n  framework: unikraft\n  monitor: qemu\n  architecture: x86\n\nrootfs:\n  from: local # specifies that the path is in the local build context\n  path: .unikraft/build/initramfs-x86_64.cpio\n\nkernel:\n  from: unikraft.org/python:3.12\n  path: /unikraft/bin/kernel\n\ncmdline: \"/app/server.py\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "urunc",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "urunc"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/urunc-dev/urunc/issues/119",

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
